name: cross-domain
description: Engine for non-obvious bridges: take a hard problem, drop the usual frame, search 5-10 solution models from OTHER domains (structural isomorphism, not metaphor), keep strange-but-testable hypotheses, delegate verification to skeptic/falsification-ladder. Core question: what hidden structure are we missing with the standard view? Триггеры: /cross-domain, /bridge, неочевидный мост, аналогия из другой области, снять рамку, скрытая структура задачи.
